parameters.content:
## 1:1 Prep Assistant

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL and YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Trigger before each 1:1 with context about the team member
3. LLM generates: agenda items, coaching questions, recognition moments, blockers to address
4. Sent to you (the manager) only — no approval gate needed

parameters.jsCode:
const { prep: p, ctx, meta: m } = $input.first().json;
const agendaLines = p.agenda_items.map((item,i) => [
  `  [${i+1}] ${item.topic} (${item.type})`,
  ...item.suggested_questions.map(q => `    Q: ${q}`),
  item.manager_action_before ? `    ⚡ Before meeting: ${item.manager_action_before}` : ''
].filter(Boolean).join('\n')).join('\n\n');
const commitLines = (p.manager_commitments_to_follow_up||[]).map(c => `  • ${c}`).join('\n');
const report = [
  `1:1 PREP: ${ctx.team_member} (${ctx.role})`,
  `Generated: ${m.generated_at}`,
  ``,
  `COACHING THEME: ${p.coaching_theme}`,
  ``,
  `OPENING: ${p.opening_check_in}`,
  ``,
  `AGENDA (${p.agenda_items.length} items):`,
  agendaLines,
  ``,
  `RECOGNITION: ${p.recognition_moment}`,
  ``,
  `MANAGER FOLLOW-UPS:`,
  commitLines || '  (none)',
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { ...($input.first().json), report_text: report } }];
